title: Node Declared Features — Enabling node declared features
text:
To use Node Declared Features, the
NodeDeclaredFeatures
feature gate
must be enabled on the
kube-apiserver
,
kube-scheduler
, and
kubelet
components.

Read the KEP for more details:
KEP-5328: Node Declared Features
Read about the
NodeDeclaredFeatureValidator
admission controller
.

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
.
